<objective>
LLM-judgment-based design ceiling-raiser. CRITIQUE finds what's mediocre, POLISH applies high-craft moves, BENCHMARK scores against curated exemplars. The ceiling counterpart to rule-based audit skills.

Phases:

- critique: LLM-judgment finding what is craft-mediocre (3-axis tier/impact/confidence output) (optional)
- polish: Apply polish patterns with before/after sketches (3-axis output) (optional)
- benchmark: Score against curated exemplars (5-dim radar output) (optional)
  </objective>
